basics.name: Dee / Dave Minion (Minidon)
basics.label: Full-Stack Working Student
basics.summary: I'm 19 and recently graduated from high school. These days, I'm collecting various certifications as I prepare to apply to universities abroad. I'm not exactly free, but I'm not exactly not free either. Personally, I have mainly worked on system development and server setup, operations, and maintenance. I also used to do the whole home-server thing. For my tech stack, please check my [GitHub](https://github.com/m1n1don). From here on, I'm thinking of living my life somewhere in cybersecurity. 15/06/2026

work.name: Virginia Commonwealth University (Computer Science Dept.）
work.summary: Selected for a scholarship program by Japan's Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology, I conducted research at a public university in the United States on visualizing and analyzing cryptographic structures in VR space. Using Unity, I explored methods for analyzing cryptographic data in a real-time 3D virtual environment and supporting a clearer understanding of cryptographic structures.
highlights: Visualized encrypted data in MR space.
Enabled surgical-style decryption through intuitive interaction.

work.name: Seriolab Japan (Buriken JP)
work.summary: Working with several programmers, I operated a contract development business for corporate clients. I handled a wide range of projects, mainly backend systems, and also ran a media outlet focused on wind music. Activities are currently paused so I can focus on my studies.

work.name: Ingnum Networks
work.summary: Centered on hosting services for game servers, I provided infrastructure services needed for stable online service operations, including DDoS protection, network design, and server operations support. I also obtained an AS number for research purposes and operated global IP addresses.

work.name: ICE
work.summary: I operated a game server that attracted around 2,000 users in one month. I handled the full cycle, from planning, building, and operating the server to attracting users through social media, managing the community, and maintaining stable operations.

work.name: System Development and Related Work
work.summary: Including work as a project manager, I have participated in more than 300 system development projects through voluntary organizations. I have been involved in driving development with the whole project in view, from requirements definition through design, development, and operations.

volunteer.summary: Using 3D CG and animation, I produced back-screen concert visuals and worked on direction and scripting.
I taught programming to around 100 junior and senior high school students.

education.institution: A private combined junior and senior high school in Shizuoka Prefecture

awards.title: Gold Prize, Shizuoka Prefectural Competition (Saxophone)
awards.awarder: Chubu-Nippon Solo and Ensemble Wind Instrument Contest

projects.name: Some Kind of Mobile App
projects.description: I more or less started this before fully figuring it out, but for now I have put up a landing page: https://kabemie.com/

projects.name: Real-Time Cryptographic Structure Analysis and Surgical Decryption in 3D Virtual Space
projects.description: A project that enables real-time visualization of encrypted data and allows direct interaction within a virtual reality environment.
highlights: Creating block-based representations of encrypted data in MR space with Meta Quest 3.
Supporting intuitive and effective data restoration through an immersive approach.
